prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) engine with a custom Stillen Supercharger Gen 3 kit (10-12 psi boost) paired with a Stillen high-flow fuel pump and 600cc Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, ensuring stoichiometric AFR under full load

HKS Hi-Power exhaust system with 3-inch titanium-coated piping, 200-cell catalytic converters, and a custom X-pipe design to optimize scavenging for the VQ37VHR’s 7,500 RPM redline, reducing backpressure by 30%

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping) with custom valving for the G37 IPL’s 53:47 weight distribution, paired with Eibach ERS race springs (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing upper mounts for subframe rigidity
estetica: Veilside Fortune 3 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom aluminum rear quarter panels) with a 2-inch rear stretch to accommodate 295/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x11 +30 rear)

Seibon Carbon fiber GT-style hood with integrated NACA ducts for direct air extraction from the Stillen supercharger intercooler, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter from Rocket Bunny’s G37-specific aero kit (Version 2)

Custom IPL-inspired rear diffuser by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece) with integrated dual 3.5-inch exhaust cutouts, matched to a carbon fiber trunk spoiler (20mm chord, 3-degree angle of attack) for -18kg of rear downforce at 120 mph
